title: Montu Armor and Item
description: Mod adds montu hammer, montu gloves and montu armor from the LetsPlay of YouTuber Lololoshka
body:
The mod adds Montu's armor, which includes a mask, a breastplate, pants, also adds a hammer, right and left gauntlets, also adds 2 fabrics and 1 leather crystal and 9 crafts.

WARNING.

Armor does not work on two-layer skins Armor can overlap with the skin in the inventory (this is not visible in the appearance, only in the inventory)

The hammer can be used as a pickaxe or sword This mod will be a great addition to the modpack and has no dependencies on other mods.The gloves have no mechanics, you can only hit with them
